candidate_llm_application: ZOU-HUN-BASIN: no-commitment dual-equal-persona-attractor inference scheme. Model maintains two persona-vectors v_A, v_B as fixed steering directions in residual stream. Per-query router α = sigmoid(W_router·h_query); v_mix(α) = α·v_A + (1-α)·v_B added to residual at selected layers. No parameters committed to either attractor between queries.
rule: hit iff kw_count>=2 OR sem_score>=0.7 OR func_score>=0.7; total_hits>=1 => FAIL

results.title: BILLY 2510.10157 — training-free merging of multiple persona vectors in activation space
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN. BILLY explicitly merges multiple distinct persona vectors in activation space producing a blended steering vector — identical in computational substance to ZOU-HUN-BASIN's v_mix = α·v_A + (1-α)·v_B convex combination. Training-free + activation-space + multi-persona-blend is the same recipe. ZOU-HUN's per-query α router is the only delta; BILLY already merges multiple vectors and steers generation. Cultural Mosuo framing supplies narrative, not mechanism.

results.title: Anthropic Persona Vectors 2025 — decode + direct LLM personality at activation level
results.rationale: Anthropic's persona vector framework provides the canonical v_A, v_B extraction primitive (mean-activation-difference style) that ZOU-HUN-BASIN explicitly uses (`computed offline via mean activation difference, like ITI or RepE`). Activation-level personality control + no-finetuning-commit is exactly the no-commitment property ZOU-HUN claims. The dual-persona convex mix is a trivial composition over Anthropic's single-persona scheme.

results.title: Steering LLM Interactions Using Persona Vectors — α coefficient controls intervention strength
results.rationale: Persona-vector steering with explicit α coefficient controlling intervention strength is the exact scalar-router primitive of ZOU-HUN-BASIN. The α-controlled intervention IS the convex-mix coefficient. Two-persona mix is a one-line composition: v_mix = α·v_A + (1-α)·v_B is just two parallel α-scaled interventions. Already canonical.

results.title: Persona Vectors in Games 2603.21398 — contrastive activation persona vectors for strategic-choice shifts
results.rationale: Contrastive activation addition for multiple persona-vectors with quantitative shift measurement covers the multi-persona-vector library + activation-addition primitive ZOU-HUN requires. Multiple persona vectors held simultaneously and switched via activation injection is the parallel-persona property ZOU-HUN claims as distinguishing. Already standard.

results.title: PSR Steer Like the LLM 2605.03907 — token-specific α estimated from activations imitating prompts
results.rationale: EXACT-TWIN of router component. PSR estimates token-specific steering coefficient α directly from activations — this IS the W_router·h_query → α scheme ZOU-HUN-BASIN proposes (sigmoid(W_router·h_query) is a degenerate linear-probe form of PSR's α-estimator). Per-query/per-token data-dependent α with no-parameter-commit is already PSR. Combined with multi-persona vectors (BILLY, rank 1), the full ZOU-HUN scheme is decomposed.

results.title: MasRouter — dynamic LLM routing for multi-agent
results.rationale: Dynamic per-query routing across multiple LLM personas/teams with no-permanent-commitment is the high-level routing skeleton of ZOU-HUN-BASIN. MasRouter is at model-level rather than steering-vector-level (which ZOU-HUN tries to use as differentiator), but the per-query soft-route-without-commit pattern is identical. Combined with PSR/BILLY which already operate at steering-vector level, the differentiator collapses.

results.title: vLLM Semantic Router — open-source mixture-of-models semantic routing
results.rationale: Mixture-of-models semantic routing per query with no-commit is the deployed-system analog of ZOU-HUN's per-query α-router. Although operating at model-selection granularity (not residual-vector mix), the no-commit + per-query + soft-mix-over-experts pattern is identical. Compositional with persona-vector-level mixing (BILLY) yields ZOU-HUN.

results.title: Attractor-Based Persona Continuity Medium 2026 — semantic basin + attractor collapse for persona continuity
results.rationale: Attractor + semantic-basin + persona-continuity is the same conceptual frame ZOU-HUN-BASIN labels as 'basin-stability'. The Medium piece focuses on single-attractor collapse, but the basin/attractor framing for LLM persona dynamics is anticipated. ZOU-HUN's claimed differentiator vs this source ('maintains BOTH attractors simultaneously, no termination') is a trivial extension to two parallel basins — and the parallel-basin property is already given by multi-persona-vector blending (BILLY). Basin language + persona-vector substrate fully anticipated.

reason: All 8 results trigger hit under sem>=0.7 AND func>=0.7 (kw_count=0 across the board because Mosuo/Awo cultural lexicon does not appear in technical LLM literature, as expected). Two exact functional twins are present: (a) BILLY 2510.10157 supplies training-free merging of multiple persona vectors in activation space producing a blended steering vector — this is precisely v_mix = α·v_A + (1-α)·v_B; (b) PSR 2605.03907 supplies per-token data-dependent α-coefficient estimation from activations — this is precisely sigmoid(W_router·h_query). Composition of BILLY (multi-persona blend) with PSR (data-driven α) reconstructs ZOU-HUN-BASIN entirely. The remaining results redundantly anticipate sub-components: Anthropic Persona Vectors supplies the v_A,v_B extraction primitive; OpenReview HpUDi5Pe8S confirms α-coefficient intervention strength is canonical; Persona Vectors in Games confirms multi-persona-vector libraries; MasRouter + vLLM Semantic Router supply the no-commit per-query routing skeleton; Attractor-Based Persona Continuity supplies the basin/attractor framing. ZOU-HUN's claimed novelty (dual-equal-attractor + per-query soft router + no-parameter-commit) is decomposed exhaustively: dual-equal-attractor = multi-persona-vector blending (BILLY, Persona Vectors in Games); per-query soft router = PSR token-specific α + α-coefficient steering (OpenReview HpUDi5Pe8S); no-parameter-commit = training-free framework property (BILLY, Anthropic Persona Vectors) + per-query routing (MasRouter, vLLM Semantic Router). total_hits=8 >> 1, candidate FAILS.
recommendation: REJECT candidate. ZOU-HUN-BASIN is a textbook composition of two existing 2025-era primitives: (1) multi-persona-vector activation-space blending (BILLY 2510.10157) and (2) data-driven per-query α-coefficient estimation (PSR 2605.03907), both anchored by Anthropic's persona-vector extraction. The Mosuo zou hun cultural framing (matrilineal Awo dual-house, no-contract, night-visit, multiple parallel partners) provides narrative justification for properties (dual-equal, no-commit, parallel) that are already standard features of training-free activation-space steering. To salvage, candidate would need: (a) an explicit night-visit-only temporal protocol where the v_mix is gated by a learned circadian-like latent that enforces ephemeral-only activation and forbids cross-query state carry-over via a verifiable orthogonality constraint between sequential α-vectors; (b) a matrilineal-house invariant operationalized as a hard residual-stream subspace decomposition (each Awo basin = an orthogonal complement, not just a direction), preventing the convex-mix from collapsing to either pure basin under any router; (c) a no-contract guarantee formalized as differential-privacy-style ε-bounded mutual information between successive query routings; none are present in the current proposal, which is competence-equivalent to BILLY+PSR composition with multi-persona library. Suggest pivoting to a property the cultural source genuinely uniquely supplies — e.g., the Mosuo Axia ephemerality + matriline-house return invariant could motivate a verifiable round-trip residual-stream reset between queries (testable invariant) rather than just soft mixing. As stated, candidate is anticipated.
